prompt: Erstelle Features für eine Content-Marketing-Plattform: GTM-Pfade, Thought Leadership, ABM-Kampagnen, Brand Voice, Kanalsteuerung, zweisprachig DE/EN, Performance-Analytics.

assertions.text: All feature slugs have at most 3 hyphenated segments
No feature description lists 3+ comma-separated parallel components/activities
The 7 input capabilities are consolidated into fewer features (not 1:1 mapping)
